username.title: AiDot Account Username
username.description: Your AiDot app username (email or phone number). Required for cloud device discovery.

password.title: AiDot Account Password
password.description: Your AiDot app password. Stored only in Homebridge config.

userId.title: AiDot User ID (optional)
userId.description: Override the user ID used for LAN control. Normally discovered automatically from the cloud login.

removeStaleDevices.title: Remove Stale Devices
removeStaleDevices.description: Automatically remove accessories for devices that are no longer in your AiDot account.
